text.title: Python Ecosystem Overview — Examples
text.summary: Worked examples showing python-overview applied end-to-end.

section.title: Example 1: canonical application
section.p: The decision record produced for a typical project that matches this methodology.

example.code: domain: web framework: fastapi python_version: 3.13 downstream_methodologies: - free/dev/python-developer/python-fastapi - free/dev/python-developer/python-async - free/dev/python-developer/python-pytest-async - free/dev/python-developer/python-code-quality

domain: data framework: pandas+duckdb python_version: 3.13 downstream_methodologies: - free/dev/python-developer/python-basics - free/dev/python-developer/python-modern-2026 - free/dev/python-developer/python-code-quality

domain: web framework: django python_version: 3.12 downstream_methodologies: - free/dev/python-developer/django-testing - free/dev/python-developer/python-pytest-setup - free/dev/python-developer/python-code-quality
